titleStmt.title: SII 26.175: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 175. (A.R. No. 164 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.

This inscription records a gift of land, made by the king, to provide for food offerings and other services to the deity Chokkaṉār represented by an āśrayaliṅga set up by a certain Tillaivināyakaṉ in the temple of Vīrachōḷīśvaramuḍaiyār at Koḻumam. The gift-land is stated to be situated in the village Ulaguḍaippirāṭṭi-chaturvvēḍimaṅgalam in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu. The signatories were Villavadaraiyaṉ and Toṇḍaimāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravatti koneriṉ
maikoṇṭāṉ karaivaḻināṭṭu Ula
kuṭaippirāṭṭi catu
rvvedimaṅkalattu sa
bhaiyārkku koḻumattu
Uṭaiyār viracoḷiśvaramu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Ā
[śraya]liṅkamākat tillainā
yakaṉ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta nāyaṉār co
kkaṉārkku taṅkaḷūril sabhaip
potuvāṉa nilamāy Irupatteṭṭā
vatu varaiyum kāṭupāḻāṉa nilattil Ivaṉ
taṅkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa naṉcey ni
lattupperuṅkarai nālām paṟṟukkuk
kiḻakku nilam Oṉpatu māvaraiyum Iṉṉāya
ṉārkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa
veñcaṉattukkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭa
lāka Iṉṉilattukku varum kaṭamai An
tarāyam Oṭṭaccu Ārāṭci Elavaiyukavai
kāṇikkai kāliṅkarāyar viṉiyoka
m maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum
sarvvasamasta Iṟaiyiliyāka Irupat
toṉpatāvatu mutal kuṭuttom Ippaṭi
kku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇ
ṭu candrādityavat celvatākak kalli
luñ cempilum veṭṭikkuṭukka §
Ivai villavataraiyaṉeḻuttu § yā
ṇṭu 5 1000 7 100 4 10 2 Ivai toṇṭaimā
ṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
